title: Followups — followups.jsonl row
description: One row per active warn-routed finding. JSONL file at docs/specs/<feature>/followups.jsonl. Authoritative store; followups.md is a deterministic render. Lifecycle: open <-> addressed; open -> superseded; addressed -> open with regression. Lifecycle reconciliation is scoped to source_gate == current_gate (cross-gate isolation).

finding_id.description: Same shape as findings.jsonl finding_id. Stage prefix discriminates source gate.

source_gate.description: Gate that emitted this row. Lifecycle reconciliation is scoped to source_gate == current_gate.

class.description: Followups never carry architectural/security/unclassified — those classes always block and never reach followups by construction.

addressed_by.description: Commit SHA (7-40 hex) or PR ref. Set when state=addressed; null while open. Written by /build wave-final via scripts/build-mark-addressed.py.

previously_addressed_by.description: When state transitions addressed→open (regression), the prior addressed_by SHA is preserved here.

regression.description: True iff this row is a regression — was previously state:addressed and re-surfaced.

superseded_by.description: finding_id of the row that replaced this one; null for pure removal (regenerate-active).
